description_long: This is a light pink baseball cap with a curved brim and a six-panel construction, featuring stitched ventilation eyelets and a fabric-covered button at the crown. The front of the cap displays colorful embroidery of a stylized sunset with the text 'Yang2020' in white and blue, set against orange and pink stripes. The cap shows visible signs of wear, including fraying and tearing around the back opening and edges, giving it a distressed appearance. The back features an adjustable strap with a metal clasp for size adjustment. The fabric appears to be soft, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with a matte finish. The overall design is casual and urban, suitable for everyday wear in city environments.
description: A distressed light pink baseball cap with 'Yang2020' embroidered over a sunset design, featuring a curved brim and adjustable strap.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the frayed back opening and partial sunset embroidery on the front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the 'Yang2020' embroidery and full sunset design, with the curved brim visible.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the clean side panel, partial sunset embroidery, and the adjustable strap at the back.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heavily frayed back opening and the adjustable strap with metal clasp.
